title: Validate and close out the hosted-pack tranche
summary: Runs the explicit cross-repo validation bundle for host parity, scaffold output, and plan runtime flattening, then closes the initiative.
scope_items: Run targeted and broad validation across WatchTowerPlan and WatchTowerOversight.
Refresh derived indexes, docs, and plan closeout surfaces.
done_when_items: Validation evidence covers all three implementation slices.
The initiative is closed with clean coordination state and no active tasks.
